description: Cleveland Museum of Art golden search cases (15): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the CMA rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-05 against the 6,899-row on-view set (currently_on_view=1 filter). Tiers mirror the Met/AIC sets: autocomplete = local FTS top-8; full = all-results; llm = relaxed-FTS stand-in for the interpret tier.
